steps.t: Bill Ferny or his agent will be at the Old Sweetgrass Farm, north-east of Adso Haybank's camp. In order to reduce his debt, Adso Haybank has asked you…
Adso Haybank's camp lies south-west of the Old Sweetgrass Farm. Adso Haybank sent you to deliver a payment to the brutish Bill Ferny and now awaits yo…
